scripts.test-deepgram: node -r dotenv/config -e "const WebSocket=require('ws');const k=process.env.DEEPGRAM_API_KEY;if(!k){console.error('Missing DEEPGRAM_API_KEY in .env');process.exit(1);}const u='wss://api.deepgram.com/v1/listen?model=nova-2&language=en';const ws=new WebSocket(u,{headers:{Authorization:'Token '+k}});ws.on('open',()=>{console.log('CONNECTED');ws.close();});ws.on('message',m=>console.log(m.toString()));ws.on('error',e=>console.error('ERROR:',e.message));ws.on('close',c=>console.log('CLOSED:',c));"
